                                         +---------------+
                                  +----->|  Redis Cache  |
                                  |      +---------------+
                    +------------+|
                   >|  Main API  +-----+
                    +------------+     |
+---------------+   |                  |
|  API Gateway  +---+                  | /------------\
+---------------+   |                  +>|  Database  |
                    |                  | \------------/
                    +----------------+ |
                   >|  Auth Service  +-+
                    +----------------+
